task.title: Normalize status text after restore actions

requirements.description: After using latest history input or summary input, set statusText back to "Ready to call helloLab." to keep the UI consistent.
acceptance: Use latest input sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
Use summary input sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
constraints: Only modify the lab project under G:\codex测试
Do not change any production project files
